Filters
  from: all
  to: all
  category: all
  status: all
Totals
  events: 5
  duration_ms: 450
  rejected: 3
By category
  batch: events=1 duration_ms=200
  query: events=1 duration_ms=50
  request: events=3 duration_ms=200
By status
  failure: events=1 duration_ms=200
  success: events=3 duration_ms=175
  warning: events=1 duration_ms=75
Rejects by code
  invalid_duration: count=1
  invalid_shape: count=1
  invalid_status: count=1
